title: DMRC Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

basic_details.short_information: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: PwBD Unreserved candidates can avail 10 years of age relaxation.

qualification.details: Executive : Full-time three years LLB or five years integrated Law/LLB Course with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA from a Govt. recognized University/Institute. Must have qualified the Common Law Admission Test for Post-Graduation (CLAT-PG)-2026. Relevant experience is required.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale (IDA): Rs. 40000-140000/- (E 1) Other benefits include Perks, Lease/HRA, Medical benefits, EPF, Gratuity and Insurance etc.

selection_process: CLAT– 2026 (for admission to post graduation) scores Group Discussion Personal Interview Medical Fitness Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC Executive Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMRC Executive (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the duly filled application form for the DMRC Executive (Legal) post is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Executive (Legal) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time three-year LLB or a five-year integrated Law/LLB course with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized university. Additionally, qualifying CLAT-PG 2026 is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the DMRC Executive (Legal) position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for specific categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Executive (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Executive (Legal) position in the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive (Legal) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a pay scale of Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000/- (E1 level), along with other benefits like Perks, HRA, and medical facilities.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DMRC Executive (Legal) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via Speed Post or email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Executive (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes CLAT-PG 2026 scores, followed by a Group Discussion, Personal Interview, and a Medical Fitness Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for the DMRC Executive (Legal) recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the DMRC's official website, http://www.delhimetrorail.com. Ensure you refer to the official PDF for all details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates, along with the filled application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DMRC Executive (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the duly filled application form for the DMRC Executive (Legal) post is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
